objective: [Momentum] sur 0GUSDC dans les 1h. Indicateurs : EMA + OBV + ROC. Entrées : Bollinger Band (BB), Fibonacci retracement, Vwap; Sorties : Slope Momentum(SM) et Confirmed Breakout (CB). Risk management : Stop Loss à BB upper/lower band, TP à BB middle line. Cette stratégie explore des combinaisons inhabituelles d'indicateurs de momentum sur le marché crypto-fiat USDC/USD en une heure. Elle vise à capitaliser sur les variations importantes dans la volatilité du marché en utilisant un arrêt précoce (SL) et une cible maximale optimale (TP).

iterations.hypothesis: Combining EMA and OBV with RSI and ROC provides a robust momentum trading strategy in the 1-hour timeframe for USDC/USD.

code.validation_error: [SIG001] `for i in range(...)` interdit dans la logique Builder.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy combines EMA, OBV, RSI and ROC to identify momentum trades in the USDC/USD market. It aims to use early stop loss (SL) and target profit (TP) at BB middle line. The backtest is currently running and results have not been seen yet.
[Backup plan] If results are poor: 1. Test other combinations of indicators like EMA, OBV with RSI and ROC or SMA instead of EMA. 2. Exclude specific time frames that perform poorly. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe): 1. Try adjusting the period length for each indicator to improve performance. 2. Add filters such as volume data to further enhance the strategy's robustness.
